description: Deepen wellbeing, spatial-ui, and robotics-bridge packages from skeletons to full implementations with comprehensive tests (20+, 20+, 15+ tests respectively).
steps: WELLBEING (packages/wellbeing/src/) - Expand from 5 tests to 20+:
1. Extend types.ts: Add CompulsionPattern, ScreenTimeLimit, BreakReminder, RetreatModeConfig, RegretEntry, CrisisResource types.
2. Create src/limits/screen-time-limiter.ts: Set per-app daily limits. Track usage against limits. Warn at 80%, block at 100%. Override mechanism (with cooldown). Carry-over unused time option.

3. Create src/breaks/break-reminder.ts: Configurable intervals (e.g., every 25 min). Adaptive (more frequent during binge sessions). Snooze with escalation (snooze 1 = 5min, snooze 2 = 3min, snooze 3 = forced). Activity suggestions for breaks.

4. Create src/compulsion/compulsion-detector.ts: Detect patterns: app-switching loops (open-close-open same app), rapid repeated checks (mail/social every 2 min), late-night usage spikes. Configurable thresholds. Pattern history.

5. Create src/retreat/retreat-mode.ts: 'Quant Retreat' - blocks all non-essential apps. Configurable duration. Whitelist (emergency calls always allowed). Gradual re-entry (apps unlock one-by-one). Streak tracking.
6. Create src/regret/regret-tracker.ts: After each session, optional regret rating (1-5). Track regret-rate per app. Identify apps with high regret. Suggest limits for high-regret apps.
7. Create src/crisis/crisis-resources.ts: Regional helpline data (India, US, UK, global). Crisis detection keywords in user behavior. Intervention UI hooks. Never block emergency access.
8. Enhance src/detection/doom-scroll-detector.ts: Add velocity detection (scrolling faster = more doom). Add content-type awareness. Add progressive warnings.
9. Update src/index.ts to export ScreenTimeLimiter, BreakReminder, CompulsionDetector, RetreatMode, RegretTracker, CrisisResources.

10. Rewrite src/__tests__/wellbeing.test.ts with 20+ tests: screen time limits/warnings/blocks/overrides, break reminders/snooze/escalation, compulsion detection patterns, retreat mode/whitelist/streak, regret tracking/suggestions, crisis resources/detection, doom-scroll velocity.
SPATIAL-UI (packages/spatial-ui/src/) - Expand from 3 tests to 20+:
11. Extend types.ts: Add EyeTrackingData, SpatialAudioSource, GestureSequence, SpatialLayout, XRSessionState types.

12. Enhance src/xr/xr-session.ts: Add session state machine (requesting, active, suspended, ended). Add feature negotiation (request features, get available subset). Add frame loop management (requestAnimationFrame-like). Add session events (visibility change, input source change). Add multi-device session handoff.

13. Create src/audio/spatial-audio.ts: Position audio sources in 3D space. Distance-based attenuation. Directional audio. Per-source volume. Source tracking (follow panel, follow user). HRTF profile selection.

14. Create src/eye/eye-tracking.ts: Gaze point tracking. Dwell detection (looking at something for N ms). Gaze-based selection. Heat map generation. Privacy (gaze data never leaves device). Calibration state.

15. Enhance src/panels/spatial-panel.ts: Add layout presets (meeting grid, document workspace, media theater). Add panel snapping (to walls, to grid). Add panel grouping. Add focus/blur for panels. Add panel transitions (animate position changes).

16. Enhance src/input/hand-tracking.ts: Add gesture sequences (pinch-then-drag = move). Add two-hand gestures (scale with both hands). Add gesture customization. Add gesture conflict resolution (multiple possible matches).
17. Create src/layout/spatial-layout-manager.ts: Per-app layout configurations. Save/restore layouts. Layout transitions. Workspace switching. Default layouts for common tasks.
18. Update src/index.ts to export SpatialAudio, EyeTracker, SpatialLayoutManager.

19. Rewrite src/__tests__/spatial-ui.test.ts with 20+ tests: XR session states/features/handoff, spatial audio positioning/attenuation, eye tracking dwell/selection/privacy, panel layouts/snapping/grouping, hand gesture sequences/two-hand/conflicts, layout manager save/restore/switch.
ROBOTICS-BRIDGE (packages/robotics-bridge/src/) - Expand from 3 tests to 15+:
20. Extend types.ts: Add RiskLevel, SafetyRule, DeviceProtocol, CommandQueueEntry, DiscoveryResult types.
21. Create src/protocols/matter-adapter.ts: Matter/HomeKit protocol adapter. Device pairing state. Command translation (generic command -> protocol-specific). Status polling. Connection health.

22. Create src/queue/command-queue.ts: Priority queue for robot commands. Rate limiting per robot. Batch command support. Command deduplication. Queue draining on kill-switch. Retry failed commands (configurable).
23. Create src/discovery/device-discovery.ts: Scan for available devices. Protocol detection. Device capability reporting. Heartbeat monitoring. Auto-reconnect on disconnect.

24. Enhance src/safety/robot-safety.ts: Add risk assessment per command (low/medium/high/critical). Add safety rules engine (e.g., 'no vacuum after 10pm'). Add confirmation required for high-risk. Add safety override with audit. Add geofencing (robot stays in zone).
25. Enhance src/commands/command-dispatcher.ts: Add command queuing integration. Add command timeout. Add command result reporting. Add batch dispatch. Add command rollback (undo last command).
26. Update src/index.ts to export MatterAdapter, CommandQueue, DeviceDiscovery.

27. Rewrite src/__tests__/robotics-bridge.test.ts with 15+ tests: registry CRUD, safety risk assessment/rules/geofencing, command dispatch/queue/timeout/rollback, matter adapter pairing/translation, device discovery/heartbeat/reconnect, kill-switch cascading.
acceptance_criteria: wellbeing has 20+ passing tests covering limits, breaks, compulsion, retreat, regret, crisis, doom-scroll
spatial-ui has 20+ passing tests covering XR session, audio, eye tracking, panels, gestures, layouts
robotics-bridge has 15+ passing tests covering safety, commands, protocols, discovery, queue
pnpm typecheck passes for all three packages with zero errors
All new modules exported from index.ts
